body_txt: He's a minor character, sometimes not even receiving a name, but he always shows up in the thick of things. Whether a bank robbery or a terrorist attack, expect this poor guy to be caught in the middle. He may be the Hero of Another Story or eventually become an Ascended Extra , but for right now, he's just that guy that seems to have horrible luck. Other characters may note his repeated appearance at the wrong place at the wrong time. A Running Gag may be associated with him. Sub-Trope of Recurring Extra . Compare to Butt-Monkey , for someone who is a more regular part of the cast. A non-recurring version of this character is the Innocent Bystander . Heroes should be careful to be nice to this guy. Someday, the dog may bite back .
